overview: QTrack is a JEE study tracker with a color-coded question grid, per-level accuracy heatmap, and mistake-based revision suggestions — helping students track their progress and identify weak areas at a glance.
features: Per-level accuracy heatmap with heat intensity colors
Top mistake tag ranking with actionable revision tips
Quick filters by status, mistake tag, and redo flag
Detail panel with notes, tags, difficulty rating, redo toggle
Progress bars for overall and per-level completion
